name: Sam and Marcus Hamburg Harbor Fish Market Adventure Germany - VR Travel

reviews.review_description:
Next VR travel destination (in the bundle I bought) is Hamburg Harbor Fish Market. Here you can see vivid market barkers, their mesmerizing performances, whether they're selling fish or fruity catchall or flowers from the Netherlands from Blumenkoenig; see what other people are buying, sampling, drinking. Cries like "lecker, lecker, lecker!" had a catchy tune impact on me ;)) 

Experience joyful market activities including the live band performance in the market hall. To some extent this (not only) Fish Market bears a resemblance to the Borough Market in London.
